cases.title: In-window check-in stores history with timestamp per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window (current time between checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt)
Registered participant with no prior CheckinRecord
Authenticated OrganizerStaff actor assigned to the event
steps: Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, staffActorContext) at a fixed in-window time
Query checkin_records table by registration_id
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 row satisfied: exactly one CheckinRecord with non-null checkinAt ISO timestamp, method Staff, and operatorId equal to staff actor; FR-16 history fields complete per BR-13

cases.title: Staff check-in persists check-in history with timestamp, method Staff, and operatorId
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window
Registered participant with no prior CheckinRecord
Authenticated OrganizerStaff actor with known operatorId assigned to the event
Real Postgres available for check-in module transaction
steps: Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, staffActorContext) at a fixed in-window time against real database
Query checkin_records table by registration_id in the same database session
cases.expected: Exactly one CheckinRecord exists with non-null checkinAt matching server-recorded time, method Staff, operatorId equal to staff actor id, and event_id linked to the registration

cases.title: Self check-in persists check-in history with timestamp, method Self, and null operatorId
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with active check-in window
Authenticated participant with Registered registration and no prior CheckinRecord
steps: Invoke checkinService.selfCheckin(eventId, participantActorContext) at a fixed in-window time
Query checkin_records table by registration_id
cases.expected: Exactly one CheckinRecord exists with non-null checkinAt, method Self, operatorId null, and registration_id unique per database constraint

cases.title: validCheckin transition creates CheckinRecord history alongside Registered to CheckedIn
preconditions: Registration in Registered state before check-in
Event check-in window contains fixed clock now
No prior valid check-in on the registration
OrganizerStaff actor authorized for the event
steps: Record beforeState as Registered from registration repository
Submit staff check-in via checkinService.staffCheckin
Read afterState from registration repository and CheckinRecord fields
cases.expected: beforeState Registered, afterState CheckedIn per state machine §2 validCheckin trigger; CheckinRecord persisted with checkinAt, method, and operatorId satisfying FR-16

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/checkins returns HTTP 200 with persisted history snapshot
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with active check-in window
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Staff JWT with event scope and fresh Idempotency-Key header
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } and staff Authorization bearer token
Compare response checkinAt, method, and operatorId with subsequent GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance row
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt, method Staff, and operatorId; attendance list row shares identical history fields; timestamp satisfies AC-05 and FR-16

cases.title: GET /events/{eventId}/attendance returns stored check-in history fields per participant
preconditions: Successful staff or self check-in recorded for a participant within the check-in window
OrganizerStaff or OrganizerAdmin JWT authorized for the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance with default pagination
Locate the checked-in participant row in items
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with attendance item including checkinAt timestamp, method (Staff or Self), participantId, and registrationState CheckedIn; staff check-in rows include operator reference when method is Staff

cases.title: Flow A check-in step persists retrievable check-in history
preconditions: E2E Flow A fixture: event progressed through publish, open-registration, and participant Registered
Event started (InProgress) with check-in window open
OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with staff token and registered participant registrationId
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance and verify participant row history fields
cases.expected: Flow A check-in step stores CheckinRecord history retrievable via attendance API with checkinAt, method Staff, and operatorId before feedback step proceeds

cases.title: Organizer attendance list UI displays stored check-in timestamp and source for participant
preconditions: OrganizerStaff logged in with assigned event scope
At least one participant with persisted CheckinRecord (staff or self method)
Event operations attendance page available per UI page list
steps: Navigate to organizer attendance list for the event
Locate a checked-in participant row
Inspect displayed check-in time and source indicator (staff vs self)
cases.expected: Row shows human-readable check-in timestamp and source/method consistent with stored CheckinRecord history; unchecked-in participants show no check-in history fields

cases.title: Out-of-window check-in attempt leaves no check-in history record
preconditions: Event InProgress with check-in window not containing current fixed clock time
Registered participant with no prior CheckinRecord
Authorized staff or participant actor depending on check-in path under test
steps: Set fixed clock outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
Attempt staff or self check-in for the registration
Query checkin_records for the registration_id
cases.expected: Check-in request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; zero rows in checkin_records for the registration; no partial history metadata persisted

cases.title: Duplicate check-in attempt preserves original history fields unchanged
preconditions: Participant already has one valid CheckinRecord with known checkinAt, method, and operatorId
Registration state is CheckedIn
Check-in window still open
steps: Record original CheckinRecord field values
Attempt a second check-in for the same registrationId
Re-query checkin_records for the registration_id
cases.expected: Second attempt fails with CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED; original checkinAt, method, and operatorId are unchanged; row count remains one

cases.title: Concurrent duplicate check-in attempts persist at most one history record
preconditions: Registered participant with active check-in window and no prior CheckinRecord
Two concurrent staff check-in requests for the same registrationId from authorized actors
steps: Launch two parallel checkinService.staffCheckin calls for the same registrationId
Collect outcomes and query checkin_records count and field values
cases.expected: Exactly one request succeeds with persisted history; the other fails with CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED or equivalent conflict; total CheckinRecord rows for registration_id is one with stable checkinAt, method, and operatorId

cases.title: Idempotent check-in retry with same Idempotency-Key does not duplicate history
preconditions: Registered participant with active check-in window
Authorized actor JWT for staff or self check-in endpoint
Fixed Idempotency-Key header value K
steps: POST check-in endpoint with Idempotency-Key K and capture checkinAt from first success
Repeat POST with the same Idempotency-Key K
Query checkin_records count for the registration_id
cases.expected: Both responses return HTTP 200 with identical checkinAt and method; exactly one CheckinRecord exists; no second history row or altered operatorId

cases.title: Paginated attendance list returns check-in history slice without unbounded payload
preconditions: Event with more than default pageSize checked-in participants each having stored CheckinRecord history
OrganizerStaff JWT authorized for the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance?page=1&pageSize=20
Verify each item includes checkinAt and method
Request page beyond totalPages and inspect envelope
cases.expected: Response returns paginated envelope with items.length <= pageSize, each item carrying checkinAt and method history fields; total and totalPages metadata valid; page beyond last returns empty items without loading full unbounded history dataset per AC-13 and NFR-16

cases.title: Unauthenticated GET attendance returns 401 without exposing check-in history
preconditions: Event with at least one persisted CheckinRecord
No Authorization bearer token on request
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance without Authorization header
cases.expected: HTTP 401 Unauthenticated per AC-15; response body does not include participant check-in history fields

cases.title: Participant JWT cannot read organizer attendance list with other participants' history
preconditions: Event with multiple participants including checked-in records with stored history
Authenticated participant JWT for a user registered on the event
GET /events/{eventId}/attendance is organizer-scoped per permission matrix
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance with participant Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden or 404 not in scope; participant cannot enumerate other participants' checkinAt, method, or operatorId history via organizer attendance endpoint

cases.title: Check-in history record and registration CheckedIn transition commit atomically
preconditions: Cross-module transaction boundary enabled for check-in write per module breakdown
Registered participant in-window with no prior CheckinRecord
steps: Complete successful in-window check-in
Query checkin_records and registration state immediately after commit in the same database session
cases.expected: CheckinRecord with complete history fields and registration CheckedIn state exist together; partial writes (history without state change or state change without history) do not occur per NFR-02 consistency requirement

cases.title: Every successful check-in write includes complete audit trail per BR-13
preconditions: Check-in module integrated with audit module per module breakdown
Successful in-window staff or self check-in about to be recorded
Known actor context (staff operatorId or participant subject)
steps: Perform successful check-in via checkinService
Inspect persisted CheckinRecord and any audit module write triggered by checkinModule
cases.expected: Audit trail captures timestamp (checkinAt), actor (operatorId for Staff or participant for Self), and method (Staff or Self) on every successful check-in write satisfying BR-13 and NFR-10 traceability

cases.title: Persisted check-in history metadata remains immutable after initial write
preconditions: Valid CheckinRecord persisted with known checkinAt, method, and operatorId
No public API or domain command exists to mutate check-in history per workflow guardrails
steps: Record original CheckinRecord field values after successful check-in
Attempt any supported update path on the check-in record (direct SQL update simulation or absent API mutation)
Re-read checkin_records row
cases.expected: checkinAt, method, and operatorId remain unchanged from original values; system treats check-in history as immutable audit metadata per Workflow D guardrails
